etapas.tutorial: The valve jammed before completing its stroke. The system indicates a torque failure.
Shut off the compressed air supply immediately as a safety measure.
Inspect the piping and the inside of the mechanical valve for obstructions.
After clearing the obstruction, reactivate the compressed air and start a new test cycle.

tutorialInicial: Place the object on the surface to begin the problem solution.
popupInicialTexto1: Point your camera at a flat surface and wait for the white background to appear.
popupInicialTexto2: Once it appears, tap the screen to view the object.
